The '''Galactic Alliance Treasury''' was the treasury department of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. It was led by the [[Finance Secretary]].

An investment analyst at the treasury noticed an increase in purchases of [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors's]] shares, and offers of futures in [[Beskar/Legends|Mandalorian iron]] on the metal commodities market upon news of the discovery of a new lode of [[Beskar/Legends|beskar]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{Mo}}
